title: Round Plywood Coffee Table
summary: This diy round coffee table is made out of 3/4" plywood.
description: This diy round coffee table is made out of 3/4" plywood. The fun part about this table is that when you cut the circle out of 3/4" plywood, you use the off cuts to make the legs!

materials.name: Box of 1 1/4" Kreg pocket-hole screws (see tools list)
Wood putty or dowels to fill pocket holes
Tinted wood stain, or finish of choice

steps.title: Cut square out of plywood
steps.body: Cut a 36" square of 3/4" thick plywood.

steps.title: Cut a circle
steps.body: Locate the center and then cut a 28” diameter circle. In the video i said 30“ but 28” gives a better leg taper.

steps.title: Cut legs
steps.body: Cut the leftover piece with a circular hole into the 4 legs.

steps.title: Taper legs
steps.body: Measure 2" in and cut off a triangular piece to taper the legs.

steps.title: Cut legs 3 and 4
steps.body: Hand draw and cut a curve on Leg 3 then use it to trace and cut Leg 4.

steps.title: Cut legs 1 and 2
steps.body: Trim Leg 1 and 2 so that the outside edge is 1-1/2” inches from the outer table edge.

steps.title: Attach legs 3 and 4
steps.body: Glue Legs 3 and 4 together and then connect to table top with pocket holes.

steps.title: Attach legs 1 and 2
steps.body: Screw Legs 1 and 2 to both the table top and to Legs 1 and 2.
